visual-anti-patterns.notes: Floating gradient orbs/blobs on landing page (pink circle, blue circle, yellow and purple shapes); no other anti-patterns observed.

visual-child-friendly.notes: Large emoji-labeled object tiles, playful tone, warm palette, and minimal text density; bottom toolbar has some icon-only buttons that may challenge younger users.

visual-consistency.notes: Consistent warm yellow/orange brand color, rounded typography, and card radii across all pages; minor drift between the AI chat panel styling and the rest.

visual-accessibility.notes: Good dark-on-light body text contrast, but orange text on cream is borderline; toolbar and top-bar undo/redo are icon-only without labels; no visible focus rings; responsiveness not demonstrated.
